## Summary

<!-- Describe the change and its motivation in 2-3 sentences. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally (`go test -race ./...`)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `make fmt` was run (no formatting diff)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if this adds or changes user-visible behaviour (flags, keybindings, features)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour (or existing tests updated for changed behaviour)
